headlines.title_cn: Gemini’s personalized AI image generation is now free for US users
headlines.title_en: Gemini’s personalized AI image generation is now free for US users
headlines.summary_cn: Google is expanding Gemini’s personalized AI image generation to eligible free users in the U.S., allowing the chatbot to create images based on your interests and data from connected Google apps.
headlines.summary_en: Google is expanding Gemini’s personalized AI image generation to eligible free users in the U.S., allowing the chatbot to create images based on your interests and data from connected Google apps.

items.summary_cn: As Anthropic forges a closer relationship with the state of California, the federal government has made an enemy out of the OpenAI rival.

items.title_cn: South Korean tech giants commit over $550B to ease ‘RAMageddon’
items.title_en: South Korean tech giants commit over $550B to ease ‘RAMageddon’
items.summary_cn: The world's two largest memory chip companies vow to build more memory lab fabs as South Korea positions itself as an AI tech powerhouse country.
items.summary_en: The world's two largest memory chip companies vow to build more memory lab fabs as South Korea positions itself as an AI tech powerhouse country.

items.title_cn: TIDAL cracks down on AI music by cutting off monetization
items.title_en: TIDAL cracks down on AI music by cutting off monetization
items.summary_cn: In addition, TIDAL will use automated tools to remove AI-generated music that attempts to impersonate an artist or a group, the company said.
